title: 5 Healthcare Cleaning Services in MA | Dory's
description: Medical offices, clinics, rehab, outpatient & admin cleaning. 5 rated, 22+ yrs, $2M insured. 109 MA cities. Call (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 109 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.
keywords: healthcare services Massachusetts, medical office cleaning MA, infection control cleaning, clinic sanitation services, assisted living cleaning, compliance sanitation

Healthcare Services Across Massachusetts

Dory's Cleaning Services provides sanitation services designed for clinical environments where professionalism, reliability, and attention to detail are essential. Founded by a professional with 22+ years of clinical healthcare experience, giving us insight into the operational realities and risks inside clinical environments.

We Currently Serve

  • Medical Offices — Physician practices and medical office environments
  • Specialty Clinics — Including cardiology practices and specialized clinical environments
  • Ambulatory & Outpatient Facilities — Outpatient care centers and ambulatory environments
  • Rehabilitation & Nursing Facilities — Rehab centers and nursing care environments
  • Healthcare Admin Offices — Administrative spaces supporting clinical operations

Our Services Typically Include

  • Surface sanitation and disinfection
  • Floor care and environmental cleaning
  • High-touch area attention
  • Restroom sanitation
  • Waste removal and maintenance cleaning

Each service plan is tailored to the specific needs and workflow of the facility to ensure sanitation is consistent, reliable, and professionally maintained.

Our focus is creating clean, organized, and professionally maintained environments that support clinical operations.

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to common questions about our healthcare services

What types of healthcare facilities do you serve?

We serve medical offices, specialty clinics (including cardiology practices), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, and healthcare administrative offices across Massachusetts. Each service plan is tailored to the specific needs and workflow of the facility.

Are your staff trained for clinical environments?

Yes, all of our sanitation staff receive specialized training in infection control procedures, bloodborne pathogen awareness, proper PPE usage, and CDC/OSHA-aligned sanitation protocols. We maintain ongoing training programs to keep our team current with the latest healthcare standards.

Do you provide compliance documentation?

Yes, we provide comprehensive compliance documentation including detailed sanitation logs, quality audit reports, and scheduled service records. Our documentation supports your facility's regulatory requirements and provides complete accountability for every visit.

What products do you use?

We use hospital-grade EPA-registered disinfectants that are proven effective against a broad spectrum of pathogens. Our products are selected to meet the specific needs of clinical environments while ensuring safety for patients, staff, and visitors.

Can you customize a sanitation schedule?

Absolutely! We offer contract-based recurring sanitation programs with guaranteed teams, scheduled visits, and documented accountability. We can customize frequency, timing, and scope to match your facility's specific needs and operational hours.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, we are fully licensed and insured in Massachusetts, carrying $2,000,000 in liability insurance coverage. This protects your facility, your patients, and our team members. We maintain all required certifications for healthcare facility cleaning services in Massachusetts.
